zh.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多
zh.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多
zh.Toledo, Castille-La Mancha, España: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sancha Fernández Barroso於大約1282年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，她的父親Fernan Perez de Barroso30歲，母親Mencia García de Sotomayor14歲。她於大約1303年與Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sancha Fernández Barroso于大约1282年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多时，她的父亲Fernan Perez de Barroso30岁，母亲Mencia García de Sotomayor14岁。她于大约1303年与Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世在她的家乡，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Barroso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jorge, Manuel, Jesus, Mario, Fernando, Francisco, Angel, Carlos, Jose Luis.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Margarida, Paulo.
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in an area of clay or loamy soil, from barroso ‘clayey, loamy’ (from barro ‘loam’).

variants.name: Barrozo
meanings: Galician and Portuguese: variant of   Barroso  .

nameMeanings.name: Sancha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of Sasha, Russian pet form of Alexander and Alexandra .

nameMeanings.name: Fernández
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Luis, Jorge, Miguel, Fernando, Mario, Jesus, Pedro, Francisco.  Portuguese Ligia, Joao, Armanda, Godofredo, Wenceslao.

Spanish (Fernández): patronymic from the personal name Fernando . The surname (and to a lesser extent the variant Hernandez ) has also been established in southern Italy, mainly in Naples and Palermo, since the period of Spanish dominance there.

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some Jewish descendants retained the surname that their families had adopted as Roman Catholics.

variants.name: Fernando
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

en.lifeSummary: When Sancha Fernández Barroso was born about 1282, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, her father, Fernan Perez de Barroso, was 30 and her mother, Mencia García de Sotomayor, was 14. She married Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia about 1303, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in her hometown, and was buried in Castile, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sancha Fernández Barroso est née environ 1282, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Fernan Perez de Barroso, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mencia García de Sotomayor, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia environ 1303, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Castile, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sancha Fernández Barroso um 1282 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fernan Perez de Barroso 30 und ihre Mutter Mencia García de Sotomayor 14. Sie hat um 1303 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Castile, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sancha Fernández Barroso è nata il circa 1282 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, sua padre, Fernan Perez de Barroso, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mencia García de Sotomayor, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia circa 1303, nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Castile, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Sancha Fernández Barrosoが約1282年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドで生まれた時，父Fernan Perez de Barrosoは30歳，母Mencia García de Sotomayorは14歳であった。約1303年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドでPedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去し，スペインカスティルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sancha Fernández Barroso(이)가 대략 1282년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fernan Perez de Barroso(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mencia García de Sotomayor(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1303년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sancha Fernández Barroso nasceu aproximadamente 1282, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, Fernan Perez de Barroso, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mencia García de Sotomayor, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia aproximadamente 1303, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Castile, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sancha Fernández Barroso родилась около 1282 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, её отцу по имени Fernan Perez de Barroso было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mencia García de Sotomayor, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia около 1303 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности кастиль, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sancha Fernández Barroso nació aproximadamente 1282, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, Fernan Perez de Barroso, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mencia García de Sotomayor, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia aproximadamente 1303, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Castile, España.
